message:
The other day, I was out for a walk with my pup, Charlie, when he decided that chasing a squirrel was far more important than sticking to our path. As I watched him dart off, I realized I hadn’t taken the time to practice our recall commands lately. Thankfully, I remembered my little trick: I always carry treats in my pocket! With a little shake of the bag and a cheerful call, Charlie came bounding back, tail wagging like he just won a prize.

It was such a small win, but it felt great knowing that a bit of preparedness turned a potential chaos into a fun moment instead. Plus, I think Charlie enjoyed the treats just as much as the chase! 

Have you ever had a little win like that with your furry friend?
